reviews.comment:
Yo avía pedido una hamburguesa doble y no llego nunca. El local estaba vacío tuve que esperar una hora entera y no llego

(Translated by Google)
I had ordered a double burger and it never arrived. The place was empty, I had to wait an entire hour, and it never arrived.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR6OFpiS0dBEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien ubicada, atención rápida, todo impecable.

(Translated by Google)
Well located, fast service, everything impeccable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUREZ3JUeWVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Gran calidad de atención tanto en cafetería como en playa!! Mis bendiciones.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service both in the cafe and on the beach!! My blessings.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEblAyNjRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno y atención ya q acepta efectivo a toda ora y sobre todo los servicios 🚻 de sanitarios pasa más de la 12. De la moche de viaje y pude pasar al baño otras estaciones no brindan el servicio a esa ora ni aceptan efectivo

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, as they accept cash at all hours, and especially the restrooms are open past midnight. I was able to use the restroom there; other stations don't offer service at that hour or accept cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9139643363290501136/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5bzllemhRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Very good service station, but full service is closed on Sundays.
